steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes how the Spanish influence appears "throughout the state." The very next clause tells us that architectural tourists "can easily recognize" the influence in multiple California buildings. We need a word meaning the influence is clearly, unmistakably present everywhere.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "palpable": Means easily perceived or plainly felt. This fits perfectly: the influence is so visible that tourists can easily recognize it across the state. ✓
  • "understated": Means deliberately kept low-key or subtle. This is the opposite of what the sentence says—tourists can easily recognize the influence, which means it is anything but understated. ✗
  • "disputed": Means contested or argued over. Nothing in the passage suggests the Spanish influence is controversial or debated. ✗
  • "corroborated": Means confirmed or supported by evidence. An architectural influence cannot logically be "corroborated throughout the state"—corroboration is something done to claims, not to stylistic presence. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
